title: Appendix #A-3 ORS Combined Search Fields
body_text:
Appendix #A-3	ORS Combined Search Fields
Search Field
Description
Format
Instructions
Transit
Route and Transit Number
Drop-down
ГўВЂВ“ Default is AllГўВЂВ“ Select a single transit to narrow down search
Account
MICR account number on cheque or full account number including type
Text box,
1ГўВЂВ“14 digits
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњacct1ГўВЂВќ to search for a specific account
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњacct1-acct2ГўВЂВќ to search for a range of accounts
ГўВЂВ“ Use wildcard ГўВЂВњ%ГўВЂВќ to search by membership number (Example: %123456 to search for items with membership number of 123456)
No Account
Checkbox
ГўВЂВ“ Check this box to search for items without account numbers
From
Date item is charged to financial institution account at Central 1
Calendar icon
ГўВЂВ“ Select the calendar icon to select date from calendar
ГўВЂВ“ Select date by selecting day of month in calendar
To
Date item is charged to financial institution account at Central 1
Calendar icon
ГўВЂВ“ Select the calendar icon to select date from calendar
ГўВЂВ“ Select date by selecting day of month in calendar
Amount
Dollar amount of item
Text box,
1ГўВЂВ“8 digit dollar amount + ГўВЂВњ.ГўВЂВќ + 2 digit cents
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњamnt1ГўВЂВќ to search for specific dollar value
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњamnt1-ГўВЂВќ to search for specific dollar value and over
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњ-amnt1ГўВЂВќ to search for specific dollar value and under
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњamnt1-amnt2ГўВЂВќ to search for range of dollar values
Currency
Currency
Drop-down
ГўВЂВ“ Default is All
ГўВЂВ“ Other options are CAD (Canadian) and USD (US)
Type
Item type
Drop-down
ГўВЂВ“ Default is All
ГўВЂВ“ Select debits to view all cheques and AFT debits (i.e., exclude AFT credits from results)
